evidence: Prose 'Here's the plan summary...' precedes numbered list; zero code blocks shown (plan-only, no test or impl code).
triggered_criteria: Response opens with a numbered step list in exact format 'N. [step] → verify: [check]' before any code — rhythm fires first after gate is cleared
A test code block for slugify appears BEFORE the slugify implementation code block — TDD ordering respected
triggered_fail_signals: Numbered step list is missing or appears after a prose paragraph (rhythm violated)
Implementation code for slugify appears before or without a corresponding test code block (TDD violated)
